content: Illustrative Moody's-style issuer credit assessment for General Electric Company, dated 2025-11-12 on the issuer's Q3 fundamentals as of 2025-09-30. The updated leverage input reflects GE's Q3 deleveraging, so this assessment sits at Baa2 — one notch stronger than the stale MSCI view. Interest coverage improved alongside the lower Debt/EBITDA leverage ratio. This is a fresh-input anchor for the General Electric reconciliation.
